title: THK-AI Research Cluster
text:
Welcome to THK-AI Research Cluster



The THK-AI Research Cluster at the Technische Hochschule Köln is dedicated to advancing artificial intelligence research and applications. Our mission is to foster innovation, collaboration, and knowledge sharing in the field of AI, with a focus on practical solutions that address real-world challenges.

title: GitHub Pages Configuration
text:
GitHub Pages Configuration
To enable GitHub Pages for your Quarto site:

Go to your repository settings on GitHub.
Navigate to the “Pages” section.
Set the source to the gh-pages branch (created by the GitHub Action).
Save the settings.

Your site will be published at: https://.github.io//
The GitHub Action will automatically render and publish your site whenever you push changes to the main or master branch.
